welcome:
Welcome, I am Diallo Abdoul-Moumouni.
Explore my portfolio
about.title: About Me
about.paragraph: Final-year engineering student specializing in Cybersecurity and Embedded Systems at the National School of Applied Sciences in Tetouan, currently completing a SOC internship at NearSecure focused on automating detection and response workflows. I combine hands-on Blue Team / SOC engineering (Wazuh, DFIR-IRIS, n8n, threat intel enrichment) with a strong foundation in embedded systems and OT/ICS security, aiming to grow into a Cybersecurity/SOC Analyst or IT-OT security engineer role.
education.1.school: National Scientific High School of Bobo-Dioulasso (BFA)
education.1.degree: High School Diploma in Mathematics and Physics
education.2.school: National School of Applied Sciences of Tetouan (Morocco)
education.3.school: National School of Applied Sciences of Tetouan
education.3.degree: Engineering Cycle in Cybersecurity and Embedded Systems
experience.title: Experience
experience.nearsecure.title: SOC Analyst Intern - NearSecure (06/2026 - 07/2026)
experience.nearsecure.desc: Designed and built a full SOC automation pipeline (SOAR) using n8n, integrating Wazuh (SIEM), DFIR-IRIS (case management), Google Gemini AI analysis, Telegram alerting, and automated HTML incident reports. Implemented alert deduplication, multi-tenant routing, and Threat Intelligence enrichment (VirusTotal/AbuseIPDB), and validated detections through Atomic Red Team simulations mapped to MITRE ATT&CK.
experience.description: Active participation in the organization of the 2023 ENSA Tétouan Business Forum as a member of the Sponsorship Committee. I contributed to identifying potential partners and sponsors, supporting logistical preparations, and coordinating with invited companies.
projects.title: Projects
projects.rtbt.title: Red Team / Blue Team on Industrial Infrastructure (OT/ICS)
projects.rtbt.desc: Full attack simulation on a virtual industrial infrastructure (6 VMs, Oracle Cloud), inspired by Stuxnet. Red Team executed a complete kill chain against a simulated Modbus TCP PLC; Blue Team deployed and operated a full open-source SOC stack (Wazuh, ELK, TheHive, Shuffle) for real-time detection and response.
projects.soc.title: SOC Process Automation (SOAR) with n8n
projects.soc.desc: End-to-end SOC automation pipeline connecting Wazuh, DFIR-IRIS, n8n, and Gemini AI for alert triage, AI-assisted analysis, Telegram/email notification, and Threat Intelligence enrichment, tested against real attack simulations (Atomic Red Team).
projects.suricata.title: IDS/IPS Deployment with Suricata on Azure
projects.suricata.desc: Deployment and hardening of Suricata in IPS mode via NFQueue on Azure, with log analysis (jq) and validated SSH brute-force blocking using Hydra.
projects.iot.title: IoT Anomaly Detection System
projects.iot.desc: Collaborative project building an anomaly detection system for IoT/embedded environments, combining sensor telemetry with machine learning-based detection.
projects.crypto.title: VaultGCSE2 - Hybrid AES/RSA Encryption System
projects.crypto.desc: Custom-built hybrid encryption system combining AES and RSA for secure data storage and exchange.
projects.tracker.title: Smart Solar Tracker
projects.tracker.desc: Development of a solar tracking system based on ESP32 and LDR sensors, with data filtering, UART communication, and servo motor control via Arduino.
projects.dtmf.title: DTMF Signal Detection with TMS320
projects.dtmf.desc: Development of a DTMF signal detection system using a TMS320 processor.
projects.barrier.title: Smart Automatic Barrier
projects.barrier.desc: Implementation of an automatic barrier system controlled by an ultrasonic sensor and Arduino microcontroller.
projects.adas.title: Traffic Sign Detection for ADAS
projects.adas.desc: Development of a traffic sign detection system using a YOLOv8 model, integrated into a Python interface implemented in a Raspberry Pi.
projects.indus.title: Embedded System for Industrial Monitoring
projects.indus.desc: Arduino-based data acquisition system (vibration and temperature sensors) with ESP32 wireless communication and a graphical monitoring interface, relevant to OT sensor/telemetry security contexts.

certs.linux.title: Linux Unhatched

certs.adas.title: Advanced Driver Assistance Systems
